name: Cranberry Banana Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cranberries and remove stems.
2. Combine the cranberries and sugar in a bowl.
3. Cover and let it sit until the fruit is tender and clear.
4. Line a pie pan with plain pastry.
5. Place thinly sliced bananas on top of the pastry.
6. Pour cranberry sauce over the bananas.
7. Cover with strips of pastry to form a lattice.
8. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 15 minutes.
